headline: GE Vernova Aggressively Scaling Investments: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
summary: GEV's $11 billion investment push, including upgraded Italian R&D and manufacturing sites, targets grid reliability, growth and stronger margins.

headline: Here’s Why GE Vernova Is a No-Brainer Buy Before July 22 Earnings
summary: GE Vernova reports earnings on July 22, and one corner of its order book suggests Wall Street may be underestimating just how far ahead of its closest rival it has already pulled.
